{{Quote|Oh, Great Forest Father. This is Teebo of Happy Grove speaking. I promise I'll never run away from home again; I'll listen to the elders and take verygoodcareofmytree . . .|[[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]]|<ref name="The Adventures of Teebo: A Tale of Magic and Suspense">''[[The Adventures of Teebo: A Tale of Magic and Suspense]]''</ref>}}
The '''Forest Father''' was a [[Deity/Legends|deity]] worshiped by the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon]] of the [[Endor (planet)/Legends|Endor]]. They believed the spirit watched over them all and listened to their prayers. [[Wokling/Legends|Ewok younglings]] were taught about the Forest Father, along with other aspects of the forests they dwelt in, after they first learned to walk.

==Behind the scenes==
The Forest Father was created by [[Joe Johnston]] for his children's book ''[[The Adventures of Teebo: A Tale of Magic and Suspense]]'', which was released in [[1984]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Adventures of Teebo: A Tale of Magic and Suspense]]'' {{1stm}}
